#redirect[[Chapter 2: Proofs, Induction, and Number Theory]]
Proofs, Induction, and Number Theory

== Proof techniques ==
We are doing simpler proofs than the ones in [[Predicate logic]]

General form of most proofs is (∀x)(Px→Qx)

* Proof by contradiction
** find a contradicting answer
* Proof by exhaustion
** exhaust all possible cases to prove it is the case
*Proof by contraposition
**assume what you want to prove is false
**prove this is a contradiction
[[Proof of square root of 2 being irrational]]

== 1st principle of mathematical induction ==
Need to find source on this

== 2nd principle of mathematical induction ==
Need to find source on this
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Chapter 2]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
